# XR-221 — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> XR-221 is the world's first meta-universe spaceport radio station, blending science fiction lore, immersive storytelling, and real-world connections to Area 15 and the Arc Project. The brand carries a futuristic, otherworldly identity rooted in deep narrative worldbuilding — think intergalactic transmissions, cosmic atmospheres, and a universe where radio waves travel beyond physical space. It sits at the intersection of immersive entertainment, speculative fiction, and avant-garde media.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://xr-221-7ea136bf.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://xr-221-7ea136bf.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About XR-221
XR-221 is the world's first meta-universe spaceport radio station, blending science fiction lore, immersive storytelling, and real-world connections to Area 15 and the Arc Project. The brand carries a futuristic, otherworldly identity rooted in deep narrative worldbuilding — think intergalactic transmissions, cosmic atmospheres, and a universe where radio waves travel beyond physical space. It sits at the intersection of immersive entertainment, speculative fiction, and avant-garde media.

## Target Audience
- Immersive Gamers
- Sci-Fi Enthusiasts
- Podcast Fans

## Industry
Entertainment / Immersive Experience / Radio

---

- Robots: https://xr-221-7ea136bf.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://xr-221-7ea136bf.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
